d: Perseus chooses a direction and marches 3 tiles forward with dazzling spearwork. Along the way, he deals [[85%]]<ATK> damage to adjacent enemies [[11]] times and continuously knocks them back in the direction of his march. At the end of the march, Perseus performs a mighty shield bash, dealing [[280%]]<ATK> damage to all enemies within [[1]] tile and stunning them for [[2]]s. Perseus stays [[unaffected]] while casting this skill.
Increases Perseus' damage during his march to [[90%]]<ATK> and his shield bash damage to [[290%]]<ATK>.
Increases Perseus' damage during his march to [[95%]]<ATK> and his shield bash damage to [[300%]]<ATK>.
Increases Perseus' damage during his march to [[100%]]<ATK> and his shield bash damage to [[310%]]<ATK>.
Increases Perseus' damage during his march to [[105%]]<ATK> and his shield bash damage to [[320%]]<ATK>.

Perseus swings both spear and shield in a circle to strike nearby enemies. With his spear, he deals [[200%]]<ATK> damage to adjacent enemies. With his shield, he deals [[140%]]<ATK> damage to adjacent enemies while gaining a shield value equal to [[360%]]<ATK> of his ATK plus [[80%]] of the damage dealt for [[6]]s. While the shield lasts, his ATK SPD increases by [[35]].
Increases spear swing damage to [[210%]]<ATK> and shield swing damage to [[150%]]<ATK>.
Increases spear swing damage to [[220%]]<ATK> and shield swing damage to [[160%]]<ATK>.
Increases spear swing damage to [[230%]]<ATK> and shield swing damage to [[170%]]<ATK>.

Before Perseus takes heavy damage, the ground within 1 tile around him turns fertile. Allies standing on this fertile ground have their ATK increased by [[14.5%]] and Phys & Magic DEF increased by [[19%]]. When Perseus' HP drops below [[40%]] of his initial max HP for the first time, he draws power from the fertile ground, increasing his max HP permanently by [[60%]] and healing himself for the same amount. Once this power is drawn, the fertile ground withers away permanently.
Allies standing on the fertile ground now have their ATK increased by [[15.5%]] and Phys & Magic DEF increased by [[21%]].
Allies standing on the fertile ground now have their ATK increased by [[16.5%]] and Phys & Magic DEF increased by [[23%]].
Allies standing on the fertile ground now have their ATK increased by [[17.5%]] and Phys & Magic DEF increased by [[25%]].
Increases his ATK by [[9%]] in battle. Further increases his ATK by [[6%]] when he has temporary stat buffs from allies.
Increases his ATK by [[12%]] in battle. Further increases his ATK by [[8%]] when he has temporary stat buffs from allies.
Increases his ATK by [[15%]] in battle. Further increases his ATK by [[10%]] when he has temporary stat buffs from allies.

Perseus is blessed by Bountiful Grace. When he gains a temporary stat buff, its effect is increased by [[20%]]. Each temporary buff from a different ally also increases his damage dealt by [[15%]] and reduces his damage taken by [[15%]]. This effect stacks up to [[4]] times.
When Perseus gains a temporary stat buff, its effect is increased by [[30%]].

When Perseus has 2 temporary stat buffs from different allies, the damage he deals is converted to true damage, and he becomes [[unaffected]]. This effect lasts at least [[6]]s each time it's triggered.
When Perseus gains a temporary stat buff, its effect is increased by [[40%]].

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, reduces damage taken by [[10%]] for [[20]]s when a battle starts. [[20]]s later, increases damage dealt by [[10%]] for [[20]]s.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 22 Crit Resist, 25 Crit DMG DEF.

d: Expands the range of fertile ground by [[1]] tile.
